inputs.label: Room Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the room in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the room in feet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de la pièce en pieds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de la habitación en pies.

inputs.label: Room Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the room in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of the room in feet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur de la pièce en pieds.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de la habitación en pies.

inputs.label: Room Height
inputs.businessContext: Height of the walls in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Height of the walls in feet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura de las paredes en pies.

inputs.label: Sheet Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of a single sheetrock panel (commonly 8, 10, or 12 ft).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of a single sheetrock panel (commonly 8, 10, or 12 ft).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir alçıpan panelin uzunluğu (genellikle 8, 10 veya 12 ft).
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge einer einzelnen Gipskartonplatte (üblich: 8, 10 oder 12 ft).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'un panneau de placoplâtre (généralement 8, 10 ou 12 pi).
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de un panel de yeso individual (comúnmente 8, 10 o 12 pies).
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول لوح الجبس الواحد (شائع 8 أو 10 أو 12 قدمًا).

inputs.label: Sheet Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of a single sheetrock panel (typically 4 ft).

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of a single sheetrock panel (typically 4 ft).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir alçıpan panelin genişliği (genellikle 4 ft).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur d'un panneau de placoplâtre (généralement 4 pi).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de un panel de yeso individual (típicamente 4 pies).

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional material percentage to account for offcuts and damage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional material percentage to account for offcuts and damage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim artıkları ve hasarı hesaba katmak için ek malzeme yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Materialanteil für Verschnitt und Beschädigung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matériau supplémentaire pour tenir compte des chutes et des dommages.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de material adicional para compensar recortes y daños.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة المواد الإضافية لمراعاة القصاصات والتلف.

inputs.label: Deduction Area
inputs.businessContext: Total area of openings (doors, windows) to be subtracted from wall area.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total area of openings (doors, windows) to be subtracted from wall area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Duvar alanından çıkarılacak toplam açıklık alanı (kapılar, pencereler).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtfläche der Öffnungen (Türen, Fenster), die von der Wandfläche abgezogen wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Surface totale des ouvertures (portes, fenêtres) à soustraire de la surface murale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Área total de aberturas (puertas, ventanas) a restar del área de pared.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المساحة الإجمالية للفتحات (الأبواب والنوافذ) التي ستطرح من مساحة الجدار.
